message:
feat(python): numpy.real_if_close wrapper parity (franken_numpy-86r3)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.real_if_close(a, tol=100) so
complex-with-tiny-imag → real conversion matches numpy. Test covers
pure real input passing through with dtype parity, complex with
1e-15j imag returning a float-kind array, complex with significant
imag remaining complex, custom tol scaling forcing complex
retention at the threshold, and default tol returning real.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
